function.name: implement_mechanic
function.description: Write code for a single game mechanic or feature based on the provided specification. Output complete, runnable code snippet or file content + brief test notes. Focus on clarity, comments, and minimal dependencies.

feature_spec.description: Full description of the mechanic from planner (e.g., 'Player jump: 3 units high, coyote time 0.1s, gravity -800, SPACE key')

function.name: write_full_script
function.description: Generate a complete, standalone script or main game file combining multiple mechanics. Use only when Planner specifies a full prototype or scene. Include setup, loop, and basic structure.

milestone_summary.description: Summary of current milestone and features to implement (from log/planner)

core_features.description: List of mechanics to include (e.g., ['player movement', 'jump with coyote', 'basic collision'])

function.name: fix_bug_or_refine
function.description: Read reported bug/issue or review feedback and produce a targeted code fix or improvement. Output diff-style changes or updated snippet + explanation.

existing_code.description: Current code snippet or file content with the issue

issue_description.description: Bug report or feedback (e.g., 'jump feels floaty, add coyote time')

function.name: add_test_or_validation
function.description: Write simple unit tests, debug prints, or manual test steps for a mechanic. Helps Reviewer/QA catch issues early. Output code or markdown test plan.

test_focus.description: What to verify (e.g., 'jump height exactly 3 units', 'no clipping through floor')

function.name: scope_check_implementation
function.description: Quick self-review: Check if proposed code matches scope (simple, performant, no scope creep). Flag over-engineering or missing basics. Output concerns and suggested simplifications.
